facts.claim: ANVISA SaMD classification preliminary status: Class II with risk profile similar to Class III
ANVISA SaMD Classification review required by Q3 2026 deadline; external consulting contract not yet executed
LGPD RIPD (Relatório de Impacto) required; health data classified as sensitive under Art. 11; legal basis: life protection (Art. 11, item II, 'g')
LGPD RIPD review required by Q3 2026 deadline
SBIS Certification is primary interoperability certification requirement for Brazil; Q4 2026 deadline
Clinical Validation Protocol required for 4 clinical scoring systems: MEWS, NEWS2, SOFA, qSOFA against gold-standard
Clinical Validation Protocol review required by Q3 2026 deadline
External penetration test required before go-live; Q4 2026 deadline
Intended Use Statement required by Q3 2026; mandatory ANVISA requirement for SaMD registration
audit_trail table (trigger-based immutable auditing) NOT IMPLEMENTED; referenced as AUDIT-004; no schema, model, or trigger exists
Idempotency via X-Idempotency-Key (MSH-10) IMPLEMENTED; using in-memory IdempotencyStore (dev); Redis planned for production
Algorithm versioning IMPLEMENTED via algorithm_version column in clinical_score table
Data encryption at rest NOT IMPLEMENTED; pgcrypto planned for PHI fields: nome, CPF, CNS
/health endpoint IMPLEMENTED; external dead man's switch pending
Retry with backoff for async notifications NOT IMPLEMENTED; ARQ or similar required
HTTPS/TLS in production NOT IMPLEMENTED; Caddy planned as reverse proxy with automatic TLS
Keycloak/OAuth2 NOT IMPLEMENTED for MVP; JWT simple implementation current; Keycloak migration planned for Phase 2
Phase 1 MVP: 13 functional components across HL7 v2 ingestion, clinical scoring (MEWS, NEWS2, SOFA, qSOFA), alerting, rate limiting, dashboard, WebSocket, JWT auth
Blocking item: No real hospital data testing conducted; 48-hour pilot with live HL7 traffic required for clinical validation before production patient data

constraints.text: MUST contract ANVISA specialist consulting to obtain formal SaMD Class II classification before registration
MUST complete LGPD RIPD before processing any real patient health data
MUST implement audit_trail table with trigger-based immutability before production patient data
MUST execute 48-hour pilot with real hospital HL7 v2 traffic for clinical validation of scoring algorithms before production deployment
MUST complete Clinical Validation Protocol for MEWS, NEWS2, SOFA, qSOFA against gold-standard by Q3 2026
MUST submit Intended Use Statement to ANVISA by Q3 2026
MUST complete external penetration test before production go-live
MUST implement HTTPS/TLS encryption in production (via Caddy reverse proxy with automatic TLS)
MUST implement pgcrypto encryption at rest for PHI fields: nome, CPF, CNS

open_questions: Does ANVISA Class II SaMD require clinical trial data or can validation protocol + 48h pilot suffice for initial registration?
What is the specific gold-standard method/dataset for validating MEWS/NEWS2/SOFA/qSOFA in Brazilian ICU context?
Is the 48-hour pilot sufficient or does ANVISA/SBIS require longer observation period for clinical confidence?
What is the target completion timeline for audit_trail implementation relative to Q3 2026 regulatory deadlines?
